title: Listening - Part 3
description: For each question, write the correct answer in the gap. Write one or two words or a number or a date or a time.
instructions: You will hear one person giving information. For questions 14–19, write the correct answer in the gap.
context: You will hear a man giving information about new services at a library.
audio_script: Man: Good evening, and welcome to the information meeting about the new library services. We have changed several things this month, so I will quickly explain them. The library will still open at nine on most days, but on Thursdays it will open later, at [14]eleven[/14], because staff training will take place in the morning. The children's story club is moving from Friday to [15]Tuesday[/15]. It will still be after school, and parents do not need to book. We are also starting a homework club for teenagers. It will be held in the [16]computer room[/16], where students can use the internet and print their work. Please remember that printing is not free. Each page costs [17]ten[/17] pence. If you need help with reading, you can speak to our new volunteer, Mrs [18]Baker[/18]. She will be here every Monday afternoon and is very friendly. We have also bought more books in Spanish, Polish, and Arabic, which you will find near the travel books. Finally, we are asking everyone to return borrowed books through the machine beside the [19]door[/19]. It is quicker than waiting at the desk, and staff can help you the first time you use it. If you already have a library card, you do not need to get a new one. Visitors who want to join today should bring proof of their address. The desk may be busy after this meeting, so you can also complete the form online when you get home. Please check the notice board before you leave, because small changes to rooms or times may be written there. If you are not sure about anything, ask a member of staff.

items.text_before: Children's story club is now on

questions.explanation: The speaker says on Thursdays the library will open at eleven.

questions.prompt: Children's story club is now on
questions.explanation: The speaker says the story club is moving to Tuesday.
The speaker says the homework club will be held in the computer room.
The speaker says each page costs ten pence.
The speaker says people can speak to Mrs Baker for reading help.
The speaker says books should be returned through the machine beside the door.
